Consulting Accelerator™
Everybody has the same amount of time and energy, they also have
the choice of where to apply it. If you choose to apply significant
energy in the design and content of your website then that energy is
going to be deducted from something else.
If you choose to apply significant energy to your social media
accounts and public “image” that energy is going to be deducted from
something else. There is an inverse relationship between “image”
and “actual” and most entrepreneurs battle with the decision to “look
successful” or “be successful”. Image VS reality.
Look rich or be rich? They are not the same.
- Sam Ovens
